name: DialogueVPR: Towards Conversational Visual Place Recognition

description: arXiv:2607.14115v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Inspired by how humans communicate spatial information, language-guided geo-localization has gained significant traction for its intuitive and practical value. Despite this progress, most methods still rely on a static, one-shot retrieval paradigm, which fails to handle the ambiguity and incompleteness inherent in real-world natural language descr...
author: Yukun Song, Changwei Wang, Xingtian Pei, Shibiao Xu, Wenhao Xu, Shunpeng Chen, Yu Zhang, Ke Zhang, Rongtao Xu, Xuxiang Feng, Pengyang Wang
